chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 266 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025 Mr. Nisar Rind, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shahab Imam, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2017 without any progress even notice has not been sought till date. On 05.03.2020 time was sought to reformulate the questions of law and the same request was made years later on 20.01.2023, when the following order was passed: “20.01.2023 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Applicant. It appears that on 5.3.2020 time was sought to reformulate questions of law but such order is yet to be complied with. As a last and final chance, week’s time allowed, failing which this Reference Application would be dismissed. To come up on 27.01.2023.” Thereafter on each successive date, applicant remained absent or adjournment was sought. Same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
